subject: Escalation: parrot blockers for Canberra | Nikola Tesla | Q3 review | INIT-1217
body: Please note the parrot stream in Canberra has shifted to a tighter timeline. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. Prepare a fallback plan if integration testing slips beyond schedule. The retrospective section links this stream to lessons from Nikola Tesla and Ada Lovelace. Reference initiative INIT-1217. Please add your comments before tomorrow morning. Tracking tags: planning, ops.
